SMALL CLAIM APPEALS
Off Calendar Nov-05-2014 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: 9:22am
APPEARANCES:
Mark Muskardin, Plaintiff/Respondent appears as Propria Persona.
Samuel Perez, Defendant/Appellant appears as Propria Persona.

Cause called for Small Claims Appeal. Parties, previously sworn, respectively present their cases in the narrative, and respond to questions from Judge Michelle Brant.

EXHA (A) E-MAIL/PROOF THAT IN NY/LIST OF BILL PAID/COPY OF LEASE
EXHR (1) NOTES FROM/CRAIG LIST OF HIS HOME/FINAL LETTER TO MR. PEREZ/REQUEST LIST OF COST BY APPELLANT/LIST OF LOST ON WAGES

Samuel Perez testifies on his on behalf.
Mark Muskardin testifies on his on behalf.
Closing augument by both parties.

9:53am: Matter is taken under submission. Newly evidence returned to the parties.

Judge Pro Tem Michelle Brant; Clerk J. Kong, D525, Not Reported.
